MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Russell L. Goodrow, Esq., of the Law Offices of Russell Goodrow, Tel. 415.722.7877, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

No other appearance. The Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MOHAMMED BHUIYA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled without prejudice.
